Container.Name: selfhst-icons
Container.Overview:
selfh.st/icons is a collection of logos and icons for for self-hosted (and non-self-hosted) software.
This is a container to reference and colorize selfh.st/icons via HEX color codes.
See here for how to use the custom colored icons. https://github.com/selfhst/icons/wiki#building-links
Example Usage https://example.com/bookstack https://example.com/bookstack/primary https://example.com/bookstack/8803fc https://example.com/custom/bookstack.png
The image is configured to reference remote icon files by default. Users who prefer to host the assets locally should consider one of the following options (not covered in this documentation): - rsync - Cloning the repository to a local folder - External tools like git-sync
A self-hosting guide can be seen here: https://github.com/sceather/unraid-templates/wiki/selfh.st-icons

Config.Name: ICON_SOURCE
Config.Description:
# Set to 'remote' to use remote assets from this repo
# Set to 'local' to use local icon files (requires volume mount)

Config.Name: STANDARD_ICON_FORMAT
Config.Description: # Specify an icon format to use when a custom color is not specified # By default, this is set to 'webp' as not all icons have SVG versions

Config.Name: PRIMARY_COLOR
Config.Description: # Specify a primary custom icon color to easily apply or update icons in bulk # Note: See the 'Building Links' section below for how to reference the primary color in URLs

Config.Name: REMOTE_URL
Config.Description: # Specify a remote URL to serve icons from somewhere other than this repository # Note: The URL must serve paths for /svg and the STANDARD_ICON_FORMAT below from its root

Config.Name: Icons WebP
Config.Description: # Only required if ICON_SOURCE is 'local' and STANDARD_ICON_FORMAT is 'webp'

Config.Name: Icons AVIF
Config.Description: # Only required if ICON_SOURCE is 'local' and STANDARD_ICON_FORMAT is 'avif'

Config.Name: Icons PNG
Config.Description: # Only required if ICON_SOURCE is 'local' and STANDARD_ICON_FORMAT is 'png'

Config.Name: Icons ICO
Config.Description: # Only required if ICON_SOURCE is 'local' and STANDARD_ICON_FORMAT is 'ico'

Config.Name: Icons Custom
Config.Description: # Optional mount for custom local icons
